name: Content Detail Hero
description: Header section for content detail pages showing name, namespace, type, description, version history, and action buttons (copy JSON, use in project).

standard.description: Full-width hero with content name, namespace badge, type chip, description, version, and action buttons.

slots.breadcrumb: Breadcrumb navigation: Registry > Type > Namespace > Slug
slots.badges: Horizontal row of type Chip and namespace Badge
slots.title: Content name with _heading2 styling
slots.meta-row: Version, author, updated date, download count
slots.action-group: Copy JSON Button, Use in Project Button, share icon

compact.description: Compact hero for inline/modal views with minimal spacing.

visual_brief: Full-width header section for a content detail page. A breadcrumb navigation trail sits at the top. Below it, type and namespace badges render inline. The content name appears as a large heading. A description paragraph follows in standard text. A meta row shows version, author name, and publish date separated by dots. An action button group on the right contains 'Copy JSON', 'Use in Project', and 'Share' buttons. Compact preset reduces vertical spacing and uses a single-line layout for badges and meta.

responsive.mobile: Breadcrumb collapses to back-arrow + parent name. Badges and meta stack below the title. Action buttons go full-width stacked at the bottom.
responsive.tablet: Standard layout. Action buttons align right of the title. Breadcrumb shows full path.
responsive.desktop: Full layout with action group floating right. All metadata and breadcrumb visible in one comfortable view.

layout_hints.hero_layout: Full-width section with breadcrumb trail (type > namespace > slug). Large title (heading2) with namespace-badge inline. Metadata row: version, downloads, last updated, compatibility. For themes: live color swatch. For patterns: component count + slot summary.
layout_hints.background: Subtle gradient matching content type color at 5-8% opacity, fading to var(--d-bg).
layout_hints.actions: Right-aligned action buttons: Install (primary), Preview (ghost), Fork (ghost). Mobile: full-width stacked.

composition.ContentDetailHero: Section(d-section, flex-col, gap-4, border-bottom) > [Breadcrumb + BadgeRow + Title(heading2) + Description(text-muted) + MetaRow + ActionGroup]
composition.ActionGroup: Row(d-interactive, gap-2) > [CopyJSONButton + UseButton(variant: primary) + ShareButton(variant: ghost)]
